law.name: Law
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You follow a strict and ordered code of laws, and in so doing, achieve enlightenment.

::ab[Touch of Law (Sp)]{id=touch icon=roll standard="You can touch a willing creature, infusing it with the power of divine order and allowing it to treat all attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws for 1 round as if the natural d20 roll resulted in an 11." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Staff of Order (Su)]{l=8 id=staff icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon touched the ‹magic-enh/axiomatic› special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="protection from chaos~align weapon|law only~magic circle against chaos~order's wrath~dispel chaos~hold monster~dictum~shield of law~summon monster IX|law spell only" save=domain}
‹family/Archon«s› are a race of lawful good outsiders.

::ab[Aura of Menace (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹staff of order/#staff›› power of the Law domain" l=8 icon=lower standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of menace. Enemies in this aura take a -2 penalty to AC and on attacks and saves as long as they remain inside the aura." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="divine favor" l3=prayer l6="planar ally|archon only"}
‹family/Devil«s› are a race of lawful evil outsiders.

::ab[Hell's Corruption (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of law/#touch›› power of the Law domain" icon=touch-roll ability="You can cause a creature to become more susceptible to corruption as a melee touch attack. Creatures touched take a -2 penalty on all saving throws and must roll all opposed skill checks twice, taking the worse result. This effect lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=command l3=suggestion l6="planar binding|devils only"}
‹family/Inevitable«s› are a race of lawful neutral outsiders.

::ab[Command (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of law/#touch›› power of the Law domain" icon=zap standard="You can give a creature an emotionless yet undeniable order, as per the spell ‹spell/command›. A Will save negates this effect. You cannot target a creature more than once per day with this ability." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="command undead" l5="greater command" l6="planar binding|inevitables only"}

::ab[Chastisement (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of law/#touch›› ability of the Law domain" icon=zap standard="You can cast a strengthened spell against a creature that damaged you since your last turn. This spell must target the creature that damaged you, and is cast at +1 caster level. Area of effect spells cannot be used in conjunction with this ability, but other spells that target multiple creatures may be." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=castigate l4=rebuke l5="mark of justice"}

::ab[Pain Is Power (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹staff of order/#staff›› ability of the Law domain" l=8 icon=def immediate="After taking damage from any source, you may attempt a DC 25 ‹rule/concentration› check. If you succeed, you gain the benefits of a ‹spell/blessing of fervor› spell for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level. If you fail, this ability is expended with no effect." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="delay pain" l2="instrument of agony" l3=agonize l5="symbol of pain"}

::ab[Prohibition (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of law/#touch›› power of the Law domain" icon=zap standard="You can command a creature within 30 feet to refrain from committing a particular action (including any referenced in the spell *forbid action*). If the creature performs the named action before the beginning of your next turn, it takes 1d6 points of damage + 1 point for every 2 cleric levels you possess and the effect ends. This is a language-dependent effect." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="forbid action" l5="greater forbid action" l9="mass hold monster"}

::ab[Touch of Loyalty (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of law/#touch›› power of the Law domain" icon=protect standard="As a standard action, you can touch a willing creature, granting it a +4 sacred bonus on saving throws to resist charm, compulsion, and fear effects for 1 hour." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="remove fear" l5="greater command"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Inner Sea Gods/226;Goblins of Golarion/27›

::ab[Master's Yoke (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹staff of order/#staff›› power of the Law domain" l=8 icon=zap standard="You can attempt to assert your dominance over any visible creature within 30 feet by declaring the target your property. The target can resist this effect with a successful Will save (DC = 10 + half your class level + your Wisdom modifier). If the target fails the save, it is affected as if by ‹spell/dominate monster› for a number of rounds equal to half your class level. The target can choose to ignore any order you give and instead take 2 points of ‹rule/Constitution damage› and become ‹misc/staggered› for 1 round. This is a language-based, mind-affecting effect." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="charm person" l5="dominate person" l8=binding}

::ab[Demand Subjugation (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹staff of order/#staff›› power of the Law domain" l=8 icon=magic ability="You can force a defeated creature to accept a binding pact as a condition of its surrender, as if you are using ‹spell/lesser geas›, except the creature must have a number of Hit Dice equal to or less than your cleric level." useMod3=Wis imp16="The ability functions as per ‹spell/geas/quest›."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=castigate l5="mass castigate" l9="overwhelming presence"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Blood of Fiends/15;Inner Sea Gods/227›

::ab[Tyrannical Strike (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹staff of order/#staff›› power of the Law domain" l=8 icon=melee immediate="Upon successfully landing a melee attack on an opponent, you can choose to forgo the damage (but not any other effects of the attack) to instead affect the creature you hit as per a ‹spell/greater command› spell, with a caster level equal to your class level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=command l3="bestow curse" l7="symbol of persuasion"}

legislation.name: Legislation
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Law› and ‹domain/Rune› domains.

liberation.name: Liberation
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a spirit of freedom and a staunch foe against all who would enslave and oppress.

::ab[Liberation (Su)]{id=lib icon=boost passive="You have the ability to ignore impediments to your mobility. For as long as you have rounds available, you can move normally regardless of magical effects that impede movement, as if you were affected by ‹spell/freedom of movement›. This effect occurs automatically as soon as it applies." useL=cleric useNC}

::ab[Freedom's Call (Su)]{id=free l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of freedom. Allies within this aura are not affected by the ‹misc/confused›, ‹rule/grappled,« pinned›, ‹misc/frightened›, ‹misc/panicked›, ‹rule/paralyzed›, or ‹misc/shaken› conditions. This aura only suppresses these effects, and they return once a creature leaves the aura or when the aura ends, if applicable." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="remove fear~remove paralysis~remove curse~freedom of movement~break enchantment~greater dispel magic~refuge~mind blank~freedom" save=domain}

::ab[Liberty's Blessing (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹liberation/#lib›› power of the Liberation domain" icon=aid standard="You touch a willing creature as a standard action, granting it a boon. A creature with this boon can, as a swift action, make a saving throw against a single spell or effect it is suffering from that grants a save. The DC of the saving throw is equal to the original DC of the spell or effect. If the saving throw is successful, the effect ends. This boon lasts for 1 minute or until successfully used to remove a spell or effect, whichever duration is shorter." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Powerful Persuader (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹freedom's call/#free›› power of the Liberation domain" l=8 icon=roll free="When you make a Diplomacy or Intimidate check, you can roll twice and take the higher result." useInc="2~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=enthrall l6="symbol of persuasion"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Perfected Form (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹liberation/#lib›› power of the Liberation domain" icon=def passive="You maintain an unshakable sense of who you are, and no force can compel you to be anything else. You gain a +1 sacred (if your patron is good or neutral) or profane (if your patron is evil) bonus on saving throws against polymorph, petrification, and transmutation effects. This bonus increases by 1 for every 5 cleric levels you have (maximum +5). Once per day when you succeed at a saving throw against such an effect, you can gain a surge of self-confidence as an immediate action that grants you a number of ‹rule/temporary hit points› equal to your cleric level and a +2 morale bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws; both effects last for 1 minute."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="paragon surge|always matches your actual race" l6="primal scream" l7=transformation}

self_realization.name: Self-Realization
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Liberation› and ‹domain/Strength› domains.

luck.name: Luck
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are infused with luck, and your mere presence can spread good fortune.

::ab[Bit of Luck (Sp)]{id=bit icon=roll standard="You can touch a willing creature, giving it a bit of luck. For the next round, any time the target rolls a d20, he may roll twice and take the more favorable result." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Good Fortune (Ex)]{id=good l=6 icon=roll immediate="You can reroll any one d20 roll that you have just made before the results of the roll are revealed. You must take the result of the reroll, even if it's worse than the original roll." useInc="6~cleric~6"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="true strike~aid~protection from energy~freedom of movement~break enchantment~mislead~spell turning~moment of prescience~miracle" save=domain}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Andirifkhu~Calistria~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chinostes (Good Aspect)~Dachzerul~Desna~Graffiacane~Lao Shu Po~Magdh~Raetorgash~Yabu"}

::ab[Malign Eye (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹bit of luck/#bit›› power of the Luck domain" icon=zap standard="You can afflict one target within 30 feet with your malign eye, causing it to take a -2 penalty on all saving throws against your spells. The effect lasts for 1 minute or until the target hits you with an attack." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=bane l3="bestow curse" l6=eyebite}

::ab[Tugging Strands (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹good fortune/#good›› power of the Luck domain" l=8 icon=zap-roll ability="You can force a creature within line of sight to reroll any one roll that it has just made before the result of the roll is revealed. The result of the reroll must be taken, even if it is worse than the original roll." useInc="6~cleric~8"}

::ab[Haze of Daydreams (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹good fortune/#good›› ability of the Luck domain" l=6 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 15-foot-radius haze of daydreams. Creatures within the haze gain the ‹misc/fascinated› condition unless they succeed at a Will save (DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). You may designate a number of creatures equal to your cleric level that are not affected by the haze. The fascinated condition ends immediately when the creatures leave the area or the aura expires." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="silent image" l2="minor image" l3="major image" l5=dream}

madness.name: Madness
description: ::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abhoth~Ajids~Alichino~Atlach-Nacha~Azathoth~Calcabrina~Charg~Chucaro~Cthulhu~Eaqueo~Ghatanothoa~Groetus~Gyronna~Haggakal~Hastrikhal~Hydim~Laivatiniel~Lamashtu~Narriseminek~Onamahli~Ose~Osolmyr~Ozranvial~Pirias~Set~Shivaska~Shyka~Sifkesh~Sivanah~Speakers of the Depths~Taraksun~The Lantern King~The Lost Prince~Trelmarixian~Tsukiyo~Zura"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You embrace the madness that lurks deep in your heart, and can unleash it to drive your foes insane or to sacrifice certain abilities to hone others.

::ab[Vision of Madness (Sp)]{id=vis icon=touch ability="You can give a creature a vision of madness as a melee touch attack. Choose one of the following: attack rolls, saving throws, or skill checks. The target receives a bonus to the chosen rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) and a penalty to the other two types of rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum -1). This effect fades after 3 rounds." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Aura of Madness (Su)]{id=aura l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of madness. Enemies within this aura are affected by ‹spell/confusion› unless they make a Will save with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier. The confusion effect ends immediately when the creature leaves the area or the aura expires. Creatures that succeed on their saving throw are immune to this aura for 24 hours." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="lesser confusion~touch of idiocy~rage~confusion~nightmare~phantasmal killer~insanity~scintillating pattern~weird" save=domain}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abhoth~Ajids~Alichino~Azathoth~Calcabrina~Chucaro~Cthulhu~Eaqueo~Ghatanothoa~Groetus~Gyronna~Hydim~Laivatiniel~Lamashtu~Onamahli~Ose~Osolmyr~Pirias~Shivaska~Shyka~Sivanah~Speakers of the Depths~Taraksun~The Lost Prince~Trelmarixian~Tsukiyo"}

::ab[Insane Focus (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹vision of madness/#vis›› power of the Madness domain" icon=protect standard="You can touch a willing creature, granting it a +4 bonus on all saving throws made against mind-affecting effects and immunity to confusion. This bonus lasts for 1 minute. If the creature fails a saving throw against a mind-affecting effect during this period, it loses its immunity to confusion and is immediately ‹misc/confused› for one round." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Fearful Touch (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹vision of madness/#vis›› power of the Madness domain" icon=touch standard="You can make a melee touch attack against a creature, causing it to experience terrible hallucinations for 1 round. During this time, the creature loses any immunity to fear effects it might possess and takes a -2 penalty on attack rolls made against you. In addition, the creature takes a penalty on Will saves made against fear effects equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum -1). This power is a mind-affecting effect." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="phantasmal killer" l6="cloak of dreams" l9=weird}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Dawning Realization (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹aura of madness/#aura›› power of the Madness domain" l=8 icon=touch standard="You can impart a shared vision of unfathomable ineffability to a living creature you touch, after which your turn immediately ends. You are ‹misc/dazed› and the target ‹misc/confused› for 1 round by what you both learn. On the following round, you are both ‹misc/staggered› for 1 round by the ramifications of your discovery. On the third round, you are confused and the target dazed for 1 round as you attempt to regain your bearings. Each round, the target can attempt a Will save with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier to negate that round's effects for both of you, though the effect does not end until the end of the third round. This is a mind-affecting effect." useInc="2~cleric"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="wall of nausea" l5="contact other plane" l6="litany of madness"}

magic.name: Magic
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a true student of all things mystical, and see divinity in the purity of magic.

::ab[Hand of the Acolyte (Su)]{id=hand icon=zap standard="You can cause your melee weapon to fly from your grasp and strike a foe before instantly returning. You can make a single attack using a melee weapon at a range of 30 feet. This attack is treated as a ranged attack with a thrown weapon, except that you add your Wisdom modifier to the attack roll instead of your Dexterity modifier (damage still relies on Strength). This ability cannot be used to perform a combat maneuver." useMod3=Wis}
::ab[Dispelling Touch (Sp)]{l=8 icon=touch standard="You can use a targeted ‹spell/dispel magic› effect as a melee touch attack." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="identify~magic mouth~dispel magic~imbue with spell ability~spell resistance~antimagic field~spell turning~protection from spells~mage's disjunction" save=domain}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Divine Alchemy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹hand of the acolyte/#hand›› power of the Magic domain" icon=magic ability="You can perform a 1-minute ritual that infuses a flask of water with one of your prepared spells, creating an improvised potion that lasts until consumed or the next time you prepare spells. You can use this ability only with spells that target one or more creatures, and the maximum spell level you can infuse in this way is equal to 1 + 1 for every 4 cleric levels you have. These potions are treated as ‹class/alchemist› extracts for the purpose of your domain spells." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="touch injection" l4="amplify elixir" l6="delayed consumption"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abraxas~Aerekostes~Aesdurath~Alseta~Amaznen~Asmodeus~Barbatos~Isis~Lorthact~Nalinivati~Nethys~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Shiggarreb~Shyka~Thoth~Tsathoggua~Yuelral"}

::ab[Arcane Beacon (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹hand of the acolyte/#hand›› power of the Magic domain" icon=aura standard="You can become a beacon of arcane energy until the end of your next turn. The aura emanates 15 feet from you. All arcane spells cast within the aura either gain a +1 bonus to their caster level or increase their saving throw DC by +1. The caster chooses the benefit when she casts the spell." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="magic aura" l4="arcane eye" l6="analyze dweomer"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Aesdurath~Amaznen~Asmodeus~Barbatos~Isis~Korada~Kroina~Nalinivati~Nethys~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Orcus~Qi Zhong~Sezelrian~Shyka~Skrymir~Tsathoggua~Urgathoa~Yuelral"}

::ab[Divine Vessel (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹hand of the acolyte/#hand›› power of the Magic domain" icon=boost swift="Whenever you are the target of a divine spell, you can grant each ally within 15 feet of you a divine boon. This boon grants a +2 bonus on the next attack roll, skill check, or ability check made before the end of their next turn." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="bless water" l5=cleanse l7=resurrection l9=miracle}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abraxas~Asmodeus~Nalinivati~Nethys~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Sivanah"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] When casting a Rites domain spell with a costly material component - or casting *permanency* on any domain spell - reduce the cost of the necessary components by 20%.

::ab[Enduring Ritual (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹hand of the acolyte/#hand›› power of the Magic domain" icon=magic swift="When you cast a spell with a duration of at least 1 minute per caster level, you can increase the spell's effective caster level by 1 for the purpose of determining its duration and preventing attempts to dispel it." useMod3=Wis imp10="The effective caster level increases by 2." imp20="The effective caster level increases by 3."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="sanctify corpse" l5=permanency l8=binding}

nobility.name: Nobility
description: ::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abadar~Arazni~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chinostes (Good Aspect)~Count Ranalc~Dispater~Erecura~Eritrice~Folgrit~General Susumu~Horus~Inma~Jacarkas~Kols~Lanishra~Lissala~Lissala (pre-Earthfall)~Losarkur~Myr~Naderi~Nalinivati~Nameless~Olheon~Omrataji~Ragathiel~Ruapceras~Seramaydiel~Shamira~Shax~Sicva~Smiad~Sugroz~Thamir Gixx~The Lost Prince~Trudd~Vale~Ydersius~Zaebos"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You are a great leader, an inspiration to all who follow the teachings of your faith.

::ab[Inspiring Word (Sp)]{id=word icon=aid standard="You can speak an inspiring word to a creature within 30 feet. That creature receives a +2 morale bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Leadership (Ex)]{id=lead l=8 icon=power ability="You receive ‹feat/Leadership› as a bonus feat. In addition, you gain a +2 bonus on your leadership score as long as you uphold the tenets of your deity (or divine concept if you do not venerate a deity)."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="divine favor~enthrall~magic vestment~discern lies~greater command~geas/quest~repulsion~demand~storm of vengeance" save=domain}

::ab[Noble Visage (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹inspiring word/#word›› ability of the Nobility domain" icon=boost passive="You gain a bonus on Charisma checks and Charisma-based skill checks against creatures that share your creature type (and subtype, if you are a humanoid). This bonus is equal to 1 + ‹misc/one-fifth› of your cleric level." standard="You can touch an ally to grant her your noble visage bonus against creatures that share her creature type (or subtype) for 1 minute. When you use this ability, you lose your noble visage bonus for 1 minute." useMod3=Wis order=psu}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="enter image" l9="overwhelming presence"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Divine Demand (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹leadership/#lead›› power of the Nobility domain" l=6 icon=boost swift="You can petition your divine patron for far greater power than you deserve. This ability can be used only as you cast a spell that has a reduced (but not negated) effect on a successful save. The saving throw DC of the spell increases by 2, and you gain a +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance with the spell. Any creature that succeeds at the saving throw instead avoids the effect entirely. If half or more of the targets are unaffected, you become ‹misc/shaken› for a number of rounds equal to the spell's level. If all of the targets are unaffected, you instead lose the ability to cast divine spells, channel energy, and use domain powers for 1d4+1 rounds; you can end this loss by loudly apologizing to your patron deity as a @HLfull-round_action that provokes attacks of opportunity." useInc="4~cleric~6"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="hollow heroism" l7="greater hollow heroism" l9="overwhelming presence" extra="If you are evil, replace the domain spells *bless weapon* and *holy aura* with *aid* and *unholy aura* respectively."}

::ab[Inspiring Command (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹inspiring word/#word›› power of the Nobility domain" icon=boost standard="You can issue an inspiring command to your allies. The inspiring command affects one ally plus one additional ally for every three cleric levels you possess, who must all be within 30 feet of you. Affected allies gain a +2 insight bonus on attack rolls, AC, combat maneuver defense, and skill checks for 1 round. This is a language-dependant mind-affecting effect."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=bless l3=prayer l6="brilliant inspiration"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chinostes (Good Aspect)~Count Ranalc~Folgrit~Naderi~Olheon~Ragathiel~Shax~Smiad~Sugroz~The Lost Prince~Trudd~Vildeis~Ydersius~Zaebos"}

::ab[Sacrificial Bond (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹leadership/#lead›› power of the Nobility domain" l=8 icon=protect immediate="When an ally within 30 feet takes damage from an attack, you can transfer this damage to yourself. This power also transfers any effects that accompany the damage. The damage done to you cannot be reduced in any way." useInc="6~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="shield other" l6="sacrificial oath"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

As worshipers of the goddess of drowning, romantic tragedy, and suicide, ‹faith/Naderi«'s› faithful are often fraught with encounters of the supernatural variety. Her followers contend more with undead than they do outsiders or magical possession, more as a matter of her portfolio than because of any actual training against such forces. Her divine worshipers use conventional means of defeating haunts or possessing spirits, but have additional power over those tied to means of death in Naderi's portfolio.

::ab[Romance Beyond Death (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹leadership/#lead›› domain power of the Nobility domain" icon=aura passive="You receive ‹feat/Command Undead› or ‹feat/Turn Undead› as a bonus feat, depending on the type of energy you channel. Increase the DC of the saving throw against these feats' effects by 2 as long as the spirits involved were slain by drowning or killed themselves. If the circumstances of the affected undead's creation was linked to romance, increase the save DC by 4 instead."}

plant.name: Plant
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You find solace in the green, can grow defensive thorns, and can communicate with plants.

::ab[Wooden Fist (Su)]{id=fist icon=melee free="Your hands can become as hard as wood, covered in tiny thorns. While you have wooden fists, your unarmed strikes do not provoke attacks of opportunity, deal lethal damage, and gain a bonus on damage rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1)." useMod3=Wis useUnit=round useNC}

::ab[Bramble Armor (Su)]{id=armor l=6 icon=def free="You can cause a host of wooden thorns to burst from your skin. While bramble armor is in effect, any foe striking you with an unarmed strike or a melee weapon without reach takes 1d6 points of piercing damage + 1 point per two cleric levels you possess." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="entangle~barkskin~plant growth~command plants~wall of thorns~repel wood~animate plants~control plants~shambler" save=domain}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

The Lady of Graves seeks the destruction of undead, be they corporeal or manifested spirits. Inquisitors of ‹faith/Pharasma› scour the world for signs of the undead, destroying such abominations on sight by means both traditional and esoteric in nature. As a result, most people come first to the church of Pharasma when seeking assistance against foul spirits. One unusual facet of Pharasma's faithful is their reluctance to excise non-undead spirits, such as demons or devils. Only the most altruistic of Pharasmin priests offer their services against possessing outsiders, as most faithful see battling such foes as being beyond their true calling.

::ab[Exorcism of Undeath (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹ward against death/#ward›› domain power of the Repose domain" icon=aid fullround="You can try to end any possession spells or effects, or effects that directly exercise mental control over a creature, as long as the effect was caused by an undead creature. You must touch the affected creature (this requires a melee touch attack if the target is neither willing nor helpless) and use a vial of ‹eq-weapon/holy water› as a material component that is consumed as part of using this ability. The target must immediately attempt a new Will save against the original save DC of the controlling effect. If the save is successful, the possession effect immediately ends, as if the target had succeeded at its original saving throw. If the possessing force is a ‹template/ghost› or similar undead, it manifests adjacent to the target and is ‹misc/staggered› for 1 round." usage="Once per day"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="open and shut" l2=knock l3="urban step" l9="teleportation circle"}

::ab[Silver-Tongued Haggler (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹agile feet/#feet›› power of the Travel domain" icon=boost free="Whenever you make a Bluff, Diplomacy, or Sense Motive check, you can grant yourself a bonus on the roll equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1)." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="floating disk" l5="overland flight" l9=gate}

trickery.name: Trickery
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a master of illusions and deceptions.
::ab[Class Skills (Ex)]{icon=skill passive="Bluff, Disguise, and Stealth are class skills."}

::ab[Copycat (Sp)]{id=cat icon=magic move="You can create an illusory double of yourself. This double functions as a single ‹spell/mirror image› and lasts for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level, or until the illusory duplicate is dispelled or destroyed. You can have no more than one copycat at a time. This ability does not stack with the *mirror image* spell." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Master's Illusion (Sp)]{id=ill l=8 icon=protect standard="You can create an illusion that hides the appearance of yourself and any number of allies within 30 feet for 1 round per cleric level. This ability otherwise functions like the spell ‹spell/veil›. The save DC to disbelive this effect is equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier." useNC}
@HL[Replacement Power:] Note: Only creatures with the ‹trait/Kobold Faith› trait can take this subdomain.

::ab[Chameleon Aspect (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=boost swift="You can subtly alter the color of your scales, blending them with the surrounding environment. While under the effect of this power, you gain ‹rule/concealment› from creatures more than 10 feet away (attacks have a 20% miss chance), and total concealment from creatures more than 40 feet away (attacks have a 50% miss chance)." useMod3=Wis useUnit=round}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=alarm l5="illusory wall" l6=veil}

::ab[Sudden Shift (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=power immediate="In the blink of an eye, you can appear somewhere else. After you are missed by a melee attack, you can teleport up to 10 feet to a space that you can see. This space must be inside the reach of the creature that attacked you." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="mirror image" l7="project image"}

::ab[Deep Cover (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=def ability="When you prepare your spells, you can also choose one cover identity - whether that of a real person or a fictitious one. You can assume the disguise of your cover identity in half the normal amount of time. When targeted by a spell or effect that would compromise your chosen disguise (such as ‹spell/detect evil›, ‹spell/detect thoughts›, or ‹spell/zone of truth›), as an immediate action you can force the creature using the ability to attempt a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). If the creature fails, it gains false information in keeping with your cover identity. You can use this false information ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="anonymous interaction" l4="zone of silence" l8="mind blank"}

::ab[More for Me (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› ability of the Trickery domain" icon=magic immediate="When another character within 30 feet casts a spell with a range greater than touch, you can attempt a caster level check (DC = 15 + the spell's level). If you succeed at the check, you receive the spell's benefit instead of one of the spell's intended targets (chosen by you). If you are already a target of the spell, you are affected as though you were targeted by the same spell twice (which may or may not benefit you; remember that bonuses from the same source do not stack). This ability does not grant you knowledge of the spell being cast." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="masterwork transformation" l6="guards and wards" l8="create demiplane"}

::ab[Fool's Privilege (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› ability of the Trickery domain" icon=def swift="Once a day, you can use this power when you fail a Bluff, Diplomacy, or Intimidate check outside of combat. You suffer no negative effects due to the failed check, and the next round you can attempt the check again without the usual penalty for a failed attempt." imp5="You can use this ability twice a day." imp9="You can use this ability three times a day." imp13="You can use this ability four times a day." imp17="You can use this ability five times a day."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="sow thought" l3=suggestion l6="mass suggestion"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Achaekek~Alichino~Andirifkhu~Areshkagal~Bastet~Besmara~Calistria~Dahak~Droskar~Gavidya~Lamashtu~Lao Shu Po~Lorthact~Mahathallah~Mestama~Muronna~Nivi Rhombodazzle~Norgorber~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Ruzel~Sun Wukong~Thamir Gixx~The Lantern King~Verex~Zogmugot"}

::ab[Thief of the Gods (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹master's illusion/#ill›› power of the Trickery domain" l=8 icon=roll free="When you make a Disable Device or Sleight of Hand check, you can roll twice and take the higher result." useInc="2~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="locate object" l7="ethereal jaunt"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

While the church of ‹faith/Asmodeus› periodically endorses the use of possession for certain reasons, it is usually vehemently against unsanctioned possession and the creation of uncontrolled undead forces. Asmodeans have a particular hatred for celestials who partake in acts of possession. Such outsiders are hunted down, and the Church of Asmodeus may offer its exorcising agents' services pro bono for the chance to strike at a particularly hated celestial. The eventual consequence of such arrangements - often left unsaid - is that Asmodeans track those they have helped in this way, and often return to force those individuals to host a ‹family/devil› for a period of predetermined length as recompense for their prior service.

::ab[Deceptive Reprieve (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=aid standard="When you touch a creature under direct mental control (such as that granted via ‹spell/dominate person›, but not via ‹spell/charm person›) or the victim of ‹rule/possession›, that creature can attempt a new Will save against the control or possession effect with a +2 bonus. If the creature succeeds, the effect or possession is temporarily halted, as per ‹spell/protection from evil›, for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your character level. While this ability is active, the target takes a -2 penalty on saves against new mind-affecting effects and new attempts at possession." useMod3=Wis}

void.name: Void
description: ‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Gods and Magic/53;Horror Adventures/49;Bestiary 4/134;Inner Sea World Guide/217›
@HL[Granted Powers:] You can call upon the cold darkness between the stars to gain flight, travel to other worlds, or summon monsters from beyond to do your bidding.
::ab[Guarded Mind (Ex)]{id=mind icon=def passive="You gain a +2 insight bonus on saving throws against all mind-affecting effects."}
:::ab{id=part l=8 icon=magic title="Part the Veil (Su)" action="Swift Action" useInc="2~cleric"}

You can lace spells you cast with the raw madness that waits in the outer darkness. Activating this ability must be done as you cast a spell that targets a single creature and that allows a Will saving throw to negate or reduce the spell's primary effect. If the target fails to resist the spell, the target is also ‹misc/confused› for a number of rounds equal to the spell's level as visions of the void cause temporary insanity.

The victim must succeed at a new saving throw each round to end the effect; these additional saving throws apply only to the additional confusion effect and not to the original spell effect. Part the veil is a mind-affecting effect.
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="feather fall~levitate~fly~lesser planar binding~overland flight~planar binding~reverse gravity~greater planar binding~interplanetary teleport" save=domain}
‹SOURCE Horror Adventures/49;People of the Stars/23;Inner Sea Gods/224;Pathfinder #46: Wake of the Watcher/62;Paizo Blog - Golarion Day Subdomains/1;Bestiary 4/135›

::ab[It Came from Beyond (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹guarded mind/#mind›› power of the Void domain" icon=boost passive="Once per day when you cast a summoning spell, any one creature you summon is more powerful than normal. The creature gains the ‹template/advanced« creature› simple template. If you summon more than one creature with a spell, only one of the summoned creatures gains the advanced creature simple template. A summoned creature that gains the advanced creature simple template in this manner looks unusually deformed or hideous. This ability only works on spells you cast as a cleric - it does not work on spellcasting abilities gained from any other spellcasting classes you might have."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="summon monster II" l5="summon monster V" l7=insanity}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Horror Adventures/49;Inner Sea Gods/225›

::ab[Aura of Isolation (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹part the veil/#part›› power of the Void domain" icon=lower standard="You can create a 20-foot aura that causes enemies within to be overcome with feelings of isolation and loss. Your enemies treat the aura as ‹rule/difficult terrain›, as they become sluggish within its area of effect. Furthermore, while within the aura, your enemies can't ‹rule/flank<ed› with one another, nor can they use or benefit from the ‹rule/aid another<_2› action. This is a mind-affecting emotion effect." useMod3=Wis useUnit=round useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="crushing despair" l6="wall of force" l8="prismatic wall"}
‹SOURCE Horror Adventures/49;Bestiary 4/135;Paizo Blog - Golarion Day Subdomains/1;Pathfinder #46: Wake of the Watcher/62;Inner Sea Gods/227;People of the Stars/23›

::ab[The Stars Are Right (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹part the veil/#part›› power of the Void domain" icon=magic passive="If you prepare your cleric spells while the stars are visible to you, you may spontaneously cast any of your Stars subdomain domain spells by swapping out a spell of an equal spell level. Any Stars subdomain spells that you cast while the stars are visible to you heal you of damage equal to the spell's level as you cast the spell."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="hypnotic pattern" l7=sunbeam l9="meteor swarm"}

war.name: War
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a crusader for your god, always ready and willing to fight to defend your faith.
::ab[Battle Rage (Sp)]{id=rage icon=boost standard="You can touch a creature to give it a bonus on melee damage rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level for 1 round (minimum +1)." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Weapon Master (Su)]{id=weap l=8 icon=boost swift="You gain the use of one ‹main/combat feat›. You can change the feat chosen each time you use this ability. You must meet the prerequisites to use this feat." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="magic weapon~spiritual weapon~magic vestment~divine power~flame strike~blade barrier~power word blind~power word stun~power word kill" save=domain}

::ab[Wounding Blade (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹weapon master/#weap›› power of the War domain" l=8 icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon that you touch the ‹magic-enh/wounding› special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="vampiric touch" l5="wall of thorns" l7="mass inflict serious wounds"}

::ab[Divine Challenge (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹battle rage/#rage›› power of the War domain" icon=boost swift="You can challenge a visible foe within 30 feet, gaining a +1 sacred bonus to your AC against that creature's attacks and a bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level on Bluff skill checks to feint against it. These bonuses last for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="warding weapon" l5="dance of a hundred cuts" l8="dance of a thousand cuts"}

::ab[Seize the Initiative (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹battle rage/#rage›› power of the War domain" icon=roll ability="Whenever you and your allies roll for initiative, you can grant one ally within 30 feet the ability to roll twice and take either result. This decision is made before results are revealed." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=aid l5="greater command" l8="greater planar ally"}

water.name: Water
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can manipulate water and mist and ice, conjure creatures of water, and resist cold.

::ab[Icicle (Sp)]{id=icicle icon=zap standard="You can fire an icicle from your finger, targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The icicle deals 1d6 points of cold damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess." useMod3=Wis}
::ab[Cold Resistance (Ex)]{id=res icon=def l6="Gain ‹umr/resist› cold 10." l12="The resistance increases to 20." l20="You gain ‹umr/immunity› to cold."}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="obscuring mist~fog cloud~water breathing~control water~ice storm~cone of cold~elemental body IV|water only~horrid wilting~elemental swarm|water spell only" save=domain}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Goblins of Golarion/27;Inner Sea Gods/225›

::ab[Sift (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹cold resistance/#res›› power of the Water domain" l=6 icon=power standard="Once per day you can reach into water and pull out an object with a maximum gp value of up to 50 gp &times& your class level. This object always has the ‹misc/broken› condition upon being withdrawn from the water. The water you reach into must be at least deep enough to fully immerse yourself in. If you're retrieving an object that would not normally float, assume it rests on top of or is entwined with debris that does float. Objects retrieved in this manner disappear after 24 hours if they're not already used up or otherwise destroyed before then." imp12="The objects that you retrieve are not broken." imp20="You can retrieve objects worth up to 5,000 gp."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="make whole" l5="major creation" l6="animate objects"}

::ab[Go with the Flow (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹icicle/#icicle›› ability of the Water domain" icon=touch standard="You can touch a creature to suppress its strong emotions. The target is affected as the ‹spell/calm emotions› spell, except it can still take violent actions and violent actions against the target do not end the effect. This effect lasts a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1). You can use this ability a number times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="cat's grace" l4="freedom of movement" l6="fluid form" l8="mind blank"}

::ab[Body of Ice (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹cold resistance/#res›› power of the Water domain" l=8 icon=boost standard="You can transmute your body and equipment to ice for a period of time. You can end the transmutation with a free action on your turn. When you take on the form of ice, you are ‹umr/immune› to cold and have DR 5/-, but you take twice the normal amount of damage from fire." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l7="freezing sphere" l9="polar ray"}

::ab[Surge (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹icicle/#icicle›› power of the Water domain" icon=line standard="You can cause a mighty wave to appear that pushes or pulls a single creature. Make a combat maneuver check against the target, using your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier as your CMB. If successful, you may pull or push the creature as if using the ‹rule/bull rush› or ‹rule/drag› combat maneuver." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=slipstream l3="water walk" l9=tsunami}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Inner Sea Gods/226;Pathfinder #80: Empty Graves/65›

::ab[Current Flow (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹icicle/#icicle›› power of the Water domain" icon=boost free="You can increase either your base speed or your swim speed by 10 feet. While swimming, you gain a bonus on Swim checks equal to half your class level (minimum 1). These effects last for a number of rounds equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1)." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="hydraulic push" l2=slipstream l5="elemental body II" l6="fluid form"}

weather.name: Weather
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] With power over storm and sky, you can call down the wrath of the gods upon the world below.

::ab[Storm Burst (Sp)]{id=burst icon=zap standard="You can create a storm burst targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The storm burst deals 1d6 points of nonlethal damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess. In addition, the target is buffeted by winds and rain, causing it to take a -2 penalty on attack rolls for 1 round." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Lightning Lord (Sp)]{id=lord l=8 icon=zap standard="You can call down a number of bolts of lightning per day equal to your cleric level. You can call down as many bolts as you want with a single action, but no creature can be the target of more than one bolt and no two targets can be more than 30 feet apart. This ability otherwise functions as *call lightning.*"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="obscuring mist~fog cloud~call lightning~sleet storm~ice storm~control winds~control weather~whirlwind~storm of vengeance" save=domain}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Refreshing Rain (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lightning lord/#lord›› ability of the Weather domain" l=8 icon=aid standard="You can call a brief shower of rain in a 30-foot radius. Creatures in the area are healed of an amount of nonlethal damage equal to double your cleric level and are no longer ‹misc/exhausted›, ‹misc/fatigued›, ‹misc/nauseated›, or ‹misc/sickened›." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="hydraulic torrent" l4="control water" l5="fickle winds" l9=tsunami}

::ab[Untouched by the Seasons (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹storm burst/#burst›› power of the Weather domain" icon=protect standard="By touching a creature, you can grant it the benefits of ‹spell/endure elements›, which last for 1 hour per cleric level." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Gale Aura (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lightning lord/#lord›› power of the Weather domain" icon=lower l=6 standard="You can create a 30-foot aura of gale-like winds that slows the progress of enemies.
